title: Four Sided Triangle
writer: Terence Fisher, Paul Tabori, William F. Temple
actors: Barbara Payton, James Hayter, Stephen Murray
plot: Bill and Robin, helped by their childhood friend, Lena, develop a "reproducer" which can exactly duplicate any object. Bill, crushed when Lena marries Robin, convinces her to allow him to duplicate her, so that he may have a copy ...
